releaseNotes: Urgent fix: v1.14.32's stereo-audio fix registered a matrix for 2-channel tracks but still upmixed them to 8 channels, which crashed plain stereo AAC playback with a different error ('Cannot create AudioTrack' for the resulting 8-channel config). Stereo and mono audio are now left completely untouched - only genuine multichannel (5.1/7.1) content gets padded to 8 channels. New: a video decoder that corrupts or freezes on real playback is now detected automatically from excessive dropped frames and permanently avoided on that device from then on. Performance: poster/backdrop images now decode at half the memory and CPU cost, cutting janky scrolling on low-RAM devices. Fix: a Dolby Vision decoder variant (DVAV) wasn't being filtered out like its DVHE counterpart. Tweak: buffer depth increased slightly on the Smooth profile.
